best_iteration_id.description: Iteration to promote as champion candidate. If omitted, the kept iteration with the highest holdout_score is used.

distillation.description: A 1–2 sentence distillation of what this run learned — the winning signal, the key transform, the dead-ends. Stored in the run summary as the cheapest thing the next run reads.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this autoresearch training run.

model_explanation.description: Global feature importance / directionality bundle for the champion model card.

recommended_next.description: What a future run should try next, given what this run learned. Stored in the run summary so the next run reads it during orientation. Keep it short and concrete.
